overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player character moves through a futuristic plaza lined with holographic advertisements and continues along city streets surrounded by towering corporate buildings with vibrant signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial plaza with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the center advertising structure

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the advertising kiosk in the plaza center

entered.detail: tall building-mounted advertisement displaying a figure in white against red background
massive floating digital billboard showing video content above the plaza
modern street furniture arranged along the pedestrian walkway
cylindrical structure with multiple digital displays and greenery on top
tall building with reflective glass facade and teal accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide futuristic plaza surrounded by towering corporate buildings. A massive red vertical billboard dominates the left side while a holographic advertisement floats on the right. The player walks forward past concrete benches toward a central advertising kiosk where a few NPCs are gathered.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk along neon-lit commercial avenue

events.description: exits the open plaza onto the sidewalk running alongside the main road

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk next to the empty street, passing decorative trees

entered.detail: multi-lane city street with yellow dividing lines and metal bollards
safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Moving from the plaza onto the sidewalk, the scene transitions to a street-level view. The red billboard looms large on the left as the player walks alongside the empty road. The holographic screen and plaza furniture fall behind while the camera continues along the railing-lined sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level view of Wakako's Pawn shop district

events.description: crosses the street and approaches Wakako's Pawn building with quest marker appearing in UI

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level past Wakako's Pawn shop, continuing through the commercial district

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with illuminated 'WAKAKO'S PAWN' signage and teal neon strip lighting
vertical light fixtures casting cyan illumination along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player reaching Wakako's Pawn shop, marked by distinctive red neon signage. Having crossed or moved to the opposite side of the street, the red billboard from previous segments is now behind. The quest UI element appears indicating an active mission, while the player continues walking past the pawn shop's glowing facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit corporate plaza into the dense street-level commercial district of Night City. It begins in an open plaza dominated by a massive red vertical billboard and a floating holographic advertisement, moving past concrete benches toward a central kiosk where NPCs are gathered. As the camera transitions from the plaza onto the sidewalk, the holographic screens and furniture fall behind while the red billboard continues to loom large over the empty road. The scene then shifts as the player crosses to the opposite side of the street, leaving the billboard behind and approaching the glowing red neon signage of Wakako's Pawn shop. Finally, a quest UI element appears on screen as the camera continues walking past the shop's vibrant facade.
